title: Backend Developer Vacancy at VMware India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at VMware India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
VMware India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VMware India:
VMware India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India!
